footer.providedBy: Weather data provided for free by

help.title: ❓ Help Center
help.q1: What is this app used for?
help.a1: Nautilus is a comprehensive dashboard designed for monitoring environmental phenomena and natural disasters. It allows users to visualize weather patterns, track storms in real-time using an interactive map, and receive clothing or safety recommendations based on forecast data.
help.q2: Where can I contact for help?
help.a2_prefix: For technical support or feature requests, please email our support team at
help.q3: How does the radius slider work?
help.a3: The radius slider adjusts the area of interest around your current location. The app calculates weather data for multiple points along the edge of this circle to give you a more accurate 'surrounding' forecast, rather than just a single point prediction.

about.title: About Nautilus
about.description: Nautilus is an advanced environmental monitoring dashboard designed to provide real-time weather data and natural disaster alerts. Built as part of a thesis project, it leverages geolocation and open weather APIs to ensure user safety through timely forecasts.
about.unauthorized: Unauthorized duplication or distribution of this software is strictly prohibited.

forecast.heat: 🔥 Very hot — wear light clothes, drink water, avoid sun
forecast.rain: ☔ Rain expected — bring umbrella or raincoat
forecast.sunny: 🧢 Sunny — wear a hat, sunglasses, and sunscreen
forecast.cold: 🧥 Cold — bring a jacket or coat
